specific_question: How many log retention audits were performed on MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform’s EHR systems between April 1 and June 30, 2025?
answer: The cybersecurity team conducted 22 log retention audits on MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform EHR systems during Q2 2025.
dr_question: In 2026, how can MediConn Solutions defend its virtual healthcare platform against coordinated ransomware attacks facilitated by foreign nation-state cyber threat actors, ensuring uninterrupted access to clinical systems and patient safety?
